title: Bauxite Market Update
summary:
Main
This week's Allied Quantumsea Research highlights bauxite export dynamics against the backdrop of a stronger Capesize iron ore freight market in Q3. Rising shipments of bauxite from Australia, Brazil, and Guinea continue to support Capesize demand, emerging as a steady foundation for freight market strength. Mining, Alumina Demand, and Trade Flows
Bauxite production is fundamentally linked to alumina demand, as more than 85% of mined bauxite is refined into alumina through the Bayer process.
